scenarios.capability: Identify and refactor SRP violations in a God Class
scenarios.reason: Agent produces refactored TypeScript files — verifiable by inspecting class responsibilities in the output files

scenarios.capability: Apply OCP by introducing abstraction to eliminate modification of stable code
scenarios.reason: Agent produces an interface and implementations — verifiable by checking that the original class is not modified to add new behavior

scenarios.capability: Detect and fix an LSP violation in an inheritance hierarchy
scenarios.reason: Agent produces a written analysis and refactored code — verifiable from file contents

scenarios.capability: Split a fat interface to satisfy ISP
scenarios.reason: Agent produces split interface files — verifiable by checking each interface only contains methods used by its target client

scenarios.capability: Apply DIP by introducing an abstraction between high-level and low-level modules
scenarios.reason: Agent produces an interface and refactored high-level module — verifiable by checking the high-level module no longer imports the concrete type
